ddls:
CREATE TABLE "permits" (
  "permit_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each permit */,
  "content" TEXT /* Description of the permit */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date the permit was issued */,
  "cost" REAL /* Cost associated with the permit */,
  "contractor_rank" INTEGER /* Rank of the contractor */,
  "address_id" INTEGER /* ID of the address where the permit is valid */,
  "contractor_id" INTEGER /* ID of the contractor */,
  "permit_type_id" INTEGER /* ID of the permit type */,
  "permit_status_id" INTEGER /* ID of the permit status */,
  "inspector_id" INTEGER /* ID of the inspector who reviewed the permit */,
  "inspection_date" TEXT /* Date when the inspection was conducted */,
  "inspection_notes" TEXT /* Notes from the inspector */,
  "renewal_date" TEXT /* Date when the permit can be renewed */,
  "completion_date" TEXT /* Date when the permit was completed */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("permit_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_permits_contractor_id FOREIGN KEY ("contractor_id") REFERENCES contractors ("contractor_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_permits_permit_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("permit_type_id") REFERENCES permit_types ("permit_type_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_permits_permit_status_id FOREIGN KEY ("permit_status_id") REFERENCES permit_statuses ("permit_status_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_permits_address_id FOREIGN KEY ("address_id") REFERENCES addresses ("address_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_permits_inspector_id FOREIGN KEY ("inspector_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "contractors" (
  "contractor_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each contractor */,
  "contractor_name" TEXT /* Name of the contractor */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the contractor */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the contractor */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the contractor */,
  "license_number" TEXT /* License number of the contractor */,
  "business_name" TEXT /* Name of the business if the contractor is a company */,
  "business_address" TEXT /* Address of the business if the contractor is a company */,
  "tax_id" TEXT /* Tax Identification Number (TIN) of the contractor */,
  "registration_date" TEXT /* Date when the contractor registered with the system */,
  "last_audit_date" TEXT /* Date of the last audit or review of the contractor's profile */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the contractor (e.g., active, inactive, suspended) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("contractor_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "addresses" (
  "address_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each address */,
  "street" TEXT /* Street address */,
  "city" TEXT /* City */,
  "state" TEXT /* State */,
  "zip" TEXT /* Zip code */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Geographical latitude of the address */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Geographical longitude of the address */,
  "geocoding_date" TEXT /* Date when the geocoding was performed */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("address_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "permit_types" (
  "permit_type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each permit type */,
  "permit_type_name" TEXT /* Name of the permit type */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the permit type */,
  "active" INTEGER /* Boolean to indicate if the permit type is active */,
  "required_inspection" INTEGER /* Boolean to indicate if an inspection is required for this permit type */,
  "inspection_frequency" TEXT /* Frequency of inspections required (e.g., monthly, annually) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("permit_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "permit_statuses" (
  "permit_status_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each permit status */,
  "permit_status_name" TEXT /* Name of the permit status */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the permit status */,
  "active" INTEGER /* Boolean to indicate if the status is active */,
  "description_long" TEXT /* Detailed description of the permit status */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("permit_status_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "permit_history" (
  "permit_history_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each permit history entry */,
  "permit_id" INTEGER /* ID of the permit */,
  "contractor_id" INTEGER /* ID of the contractor */,
  "issue_date" TEXT /* Date the permit was issued */,
  "completion_date" TEXT /* Date the permit was completed */,
  "status_id" INTEGER /* ID of the status at the time of the history entry */,
  "inspector_id" INTEGER /* ID of the inspector who reviewed the permit */,
  "inspection_date" TEXT /* Date when the inspection was conducted */,
  "inspection_notes" TEXT /* Notes from the inspector */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("permit_history_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_permit_history_contractor_id FOREIGN KEY ("contractor_id") REFERENCES contractors ("contractor_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_permit_history_inspector_id FOREIGN KEY ("inspector_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_permit_history_permit_id FOREIGN KEY ("permit_id") REFERENCES permits ("permit_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_permit_history_status_id FOREIGN KEY ("status_id") REFERENCES permit_statuses ("permit_status_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "scores" (
  "score_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each score entry */,
  "contractor_id" INTEGER /* ID of the contractor */,
  "score" INTEGER /* Score assigned to the contractor */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date the score was assigned */,
  "inspector_id" INTEGER /* ID of the inspector who assigned the score */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Notes or comments regarding the score */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("score_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_scores_contractor_id FOREIGN KEY ("contractor_id") REFERENCES contractors ("contractor_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_scores_inspector_id FOREIGN KEY ("inspector_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., city official, contractor, admin) */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for the user */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date and time of the last login */,
  "last_password_change" TEXT /* Date of the last password change */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the user (e.g., active, inactive, suspended) */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department the user belongs to */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "permit_comments" (
  "permit_comment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each permit comment */,
  "permit_id" INTEGER /* ID of the permit */,
  "comment" TEXT /* Comment or note */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date the comment was made */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who made the comment */,
  "inspector_id" INTEGER /* ID of the inspector who made the comment */,
  "status_id" INTEGER /* ID of the status at the time of the comment */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("permit_comment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_permit_comments_inspector_id FOREIGN KEY ("inspector_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_permit_comments_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_permit_comments_status_id FOREIGN KEY ("status_id") REFERENCES permit_statuses ("permit_status_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_permit_comments_permit_id FOREIGN KEY ("permit_id") REFERENCES permits ("permit_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "attachments" (
  "attachment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each attachment */,
  "permit_id" INTEGER /* ID of the permit */,
  "file_name" TEXT /* Name of the file */,
  "file_type" TEXT /* Type of file (e.g., PDF, JPEG) */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who uploaded the attachment */,
  "upload_date" TEXT /* Date when the attachment was uploaded */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the attachment */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("attachment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_attachments_permit_id FOREIGN KEY ("permit_id") REFERENCES permits ("permit_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_attachments_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "audits" (
  "audit_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each audit entry */,
  "permit_id" INTEGER /* ID of the permit */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user making the change */,
  "change_date" TEXT /* Date the change was made */,
  "change_type" TEXT /* Type of change (e.g., update, delete, insert) */,
  "action" TEXT /* Detailed action taken (e.g., updated permit status, added comment) */,
  "old_value" TEXT /* Previous value before the change */,
  "new_value" TEXT /* New value after the change */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("audit_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_audits_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_audits_permit_id FOREIGN KEY ("permit_id") REFERENCES permits ("permit_id")
)
